meaning: adj.未充分就业的,学非所用的n.大材小用的人
examples: They may also be described as underemployed or freelance workers.
Lots of underemployed young people mean too many hotheads and not enough elders.
And for every two Mexicans without a job, there are three who are underemployed.
But in the current economy, many college graduates are finding themselves unemployed or underemployed.
China has done the easy part: attracting underemployed young rural residents to urban jobs.
